Pricing
SIMPLE & FLAT RATE

No hidden fees. No surprises. Two options — pick yours, text us your address, and we'll handle the rest.

$40
Standard Curb Number

Bold, clean address numbers painted directly on your curb. High-contrast, long-lasting, and done in under an hour. Have a two-sided curb? Add $20.
Two-sided curb +$20

$50
With Neighborhood Logo

Your address number plus your neighborhood's official logo — East Sac, River Park, Curtis Park, or Oak Park. Show some local pride.

Block
Special
10+ Homes on Your Block

Coordinate with your neighbors and everyone saves. Text us for block pricing — the more homes, the better the deal.

The Process
HOW IT WORKS
01

Text Us Your Address

Send us a text at (916) 562-9915 with your address and which option you want — standard or with logo.

02

We Show Up & Paint

We'll schedule a time and come to you. The whole job is done in under an hour from start to finish.

03

Done. Looks Great.

Clean, crisp numbers that dry the same day. Neighbors will be asking who did yours.
